evals.prompt: Review this Azure DevOps pipeline YAML for template referencing, naming conventions, and parameter design issues.
evals.expected_output: Should flag: (1) relative template path ./templates/DeployArena.yml instead of absolute from repo root, (2) PascalCase filename DeployArena.yml instead of kebab-case, (3) parameters lack explicit type declarations
expectations: Flags the relative template path (./templates/DeployArena.yml) and recommends an absolute path from the repository root
Flags the PascalCase filename DeployArena.yml and recommends kebab-case (deploy-arena.yml)
Flags that parameters lack explicit type declarations (environment should have type: string, doRestore should have type: boolean)

evals.prompt: Review this Azure DevOps pipeline YAML for DRY violations and operational hygiene issues.
evals.expected_output: Should flag: (1) DeployO and DeployT stages are duplicated — should use each expression or template, (2) PowerShell tasks missing failOnStderr: true, (3) Cleanup stage missing condition: always()
expectations: Flags the duplicated DeployO/DeployT stages and recommends using an each expression or stage template
Flags that PowerShell@2 tasks are missing failOnStderr: true
Flags that the Cleanup stage has no condition and should use condition: always() to run even on failure
